(Robin Roberts presents the clue.) In 1996, the craze for this "Sesame Street" toy was in full swing, with a Tyco publicist saying, "By 10 a.m. on Black Friday, every one of them was gone"

(Michael Strahan presents the clue.) On a chilly February morning on February in 2012, I was a guest of honor at this Super Bowl winning team's New York City ticker-tape parade; I'd been there before as a member of the same team in 2008
